description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:latest Docker image with the docker service and defines the environment variable TRAVIS_HOST=127.0.0.1 TRAVIS_PORT=4001. Define two stages: build and test. In the build stage add an install_dependencies job that runs docker pull rqlite/rqlite, docker run -d -p 127.0.0.1:4001:4001 -p 127.0.0.1:4002:4002 rqlite/rqlite, docker ps -a, then npm install, and stores the node_modules/ directory as an artifact. In the test stage add a test_with_lab job that runs npm test.
